headerTitle: Technical PM & Solutions Architect  ·  Virtual Atlantic  ·  Remote SaaS
subjectText: Technical PM & Solutions Architect — Virtual Atlantic (Remote) · $93K–$111K
intro: SaaS implementation roles live or die on the person who can translate between what the product does and what the client actually needs — and then own the gap. I've run that loop as the sole technical lead across 13 production platforms: assess the operation, architect the solution, drive adoption with non-technical stakeholders, and ship.
bullets: SaaS Implementation Ownership — Deployed full-stack platforms into live business operations across roofing, healthcare, hospitality, and real estate — each engagement starting from client assessment, ending with a running system and trained team. Not a handoff role: I own outcomes.

Technical Project Management — Managed multi-phase builds with external stakeholders, vendor integrations (Stripe, Twilio, Google OAuth, SMTP, IVR), and cross-functional dependencies — while writing the code. Twelve years of GM-level operational management means I know how to run a project, not just participate in one.

Solutions Architecture at Scale — Designed multi-tenant SaaS architecture: REST API contracts, PostgreSQL schemas, auth systems, Docker + PM2 + Nginx infra — built to hand off to a client or a future engineering team without rework.
matchNotes: Strong implementation/solutions fit; PM+architect combo maps well to solo FDE engagement model; salary below typical floor but remote and fresh listing
